reviews.review_description: Was looking forward to this but as soon as I booted it up the audio was studdering and choppy. Unplayable. Ran from galaxy s6.
Like it but sound is just terrible.
Loving this and cant wait to see what happens next! Great intro to virtual reality storytelling.
When is the next chapter coming?
Awesome
The game is really fun. Thank you.
Doesn't like spinning around in a chair. I want to control view from my gamepad.

Ok so graphically it is top notch. The concept is perfect for vr, story is intriguing (I didn't get far, I'll explain why), the lead actor is good. Now for the bad. DO NOT PUSH THE BACK BUTTON AT ANY TIME. I pushed the back button for some reason, and it goes back to main screen, and you have to start over. No checkpoints, no saves. If it is to be done in one shot, there should be some approximate time line stated. But all in all I'm impressed, but please add checkpoints or something.  And also I was stuck staring at the apt for too long, couldn't figure out what to do...

This game is like the FMV games of yore. Very well done in VR and makes you think you are right there with real people. If they make a whole game hopefully the interactivity is a bit deeper though with some true detective mental challenges.

I play a lot of these kind of games on my phone, so adding VR gives you a real feeling of actually being with the characters on scene. This is done quite well even if the storyline is cheesy and full of plot holes!

reviews.review_title: Super fun FMV game in the making!
reviews.review_description: This is a great game that uses a mix of virtual reality with old school 1990s full motion video game play. It doesn't take itself too seriously being a new war game, but the entire set of gameplay here uses real FMV cutscenes, real actors, and 3D scan rooms and areas. It is somewhat simple, but it is nevertheless an engaging and entertaining sample of the full game that's to come. Definitely worth the 10 - 15 minutes and I'm looking forward to what they have next!

reviews.review_title: I wish i could get it to work.
reviews.review_description: Video plays but the audio is constant stuttering. Ive tried on my s7 Edge and my Note 7.  Same issue.  Not sure how to correct this.

This is definatly worth a look. I loved the style of this short but exciting experience. I felt like I was on the set of a Hitchcock movie in parts of this. And it was pretty exciting spotting a couple of great aussie actors in there! Looking forward to the next part.
Spanish language, please
Keeps crashing forcing me to start all over again. Ive uninstalled/reinstalled 3 times. Not worth the headache.
Short and pointless experience, essentially just a demo.
Does not support my S6

reviews.review_title: Good story, but short. Audio distortion.
reviews.review_description: I enjoyed the story's premise and plot.  Agree with other comments that it is too short and needs an update.  Core problem was the terrible audio distortion when using my LG Infinium bluetooth headset.  Played ok without the headset. Would like to see more!

The is very well done, but it is only worthy of 5 stars if it's updated. This is a continuing story, and so far it just feels incomplete.  Hope there are plans to update soon.

For now it's 3 because it is incomplete.
Great intreactive vr
